description_long: This chest of drawers features a robust, rectangular structure with a muted blue frame and three wide, deep drawers on the front, each finished in a reddish-brown color. The drawers are equipped with small, centrally placed knob handles, making them easy to pull open. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing items such as lamps, books, or decorative objects. A raised back panel runs along the rear edge of the top, providing a subtle barrier that could prevent items from falling off the back. The sides and back are plain, with no additional features or embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist, utilitarian design. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of wood or engineered wood, with a painted or laminated finish.
description: A sturdy, blue-framed chest of drawers with three reddish-brown drawers and small central knobs, topped with a raised back panel. Its minimalist design is functional and suitable for urban interiors or utility spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing three reddish-brown drawers with small central knobs and a blue frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid blue side panel and the raised back panel, with no visible drawers.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain blue back panel and the raised back panel at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the blue side and raised back panel.
